title: Safety Inspection Report Template
scenario: Create a safety inspection report template for a workplace with common hazards such as electrical equipment, chemicals, and fire hazards. The template should be written in a clear and concise manner suitable for safety inspectors to use.
constraints: Must be written in a format suitable for safety inspectors
Must include a list of common hazards to inspect for

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated template adheres to the given constraints (format, contents, word count).
The template includes accurate and up-to-date information on common hazards to inspect for.
The template is clear and easy to understand for the target audience (safety inspectors).
